reviews.review_title: THIS IS THE BEST GAME IVE EVER PLAYED
reviews.review_description: this game has everything you could want it’s got a shop, game modes, forest and more ,PLAY THIS GAME
The game is way too bright and laggy maybe you could make it a little less bright

developer_response.body: I have added an option to disable lighting, which might fix the lag and reduce brightness.

reviews.review_description: I cant see my arms and really laggy and the computer is hard to use also when i was trying buy the og badge i didn't know if i had it on bc i cant see my arms and hard to move bc of the lag and no players

developer_response.body: the arms problem and the multiplayer problem is because of hackers, the game has currently been hacked and I am working hard towards fixing it. Once it is fixed, you will be able to see your body and play with your friends without any issues!

reviews.review_title: The starting are is very laggy
reviews.review_description: I can’t see my arms, and also in on,y up mode, the top hat softlocked me

developer_response.body: the arms problem and the multiplayer problem is because of hackers, the game has currently been hacked and I am working hard towards fixing it. Once it is fixed, you will be able to see your body and play with your friends without any issues!

reviews.review_description: It sounds amazing and I follow the creator on TikTok
